items.title: Daily GSC enrichment worker is registered
steps: 1. Verify worker registration with npx tsc --noEmit
items.expected: A daily harvest-market-intelligence job queues mode enrich-gsc after GSC harvest
items.evidence: worker.ts registers harvest-market-intelligence and schedules daily-market-intelligence-enrichment at 5:30 AM UTC.

items.title: Monthly full refresh worker is registered
steps: 1. Verify worker registration with npx tsc --noEmit
items.expected: A monthly job queues mode full with fetchFreshGbp true
items.evidence: worker.ts schedules monthly-market-intelligence-refresh at 6:30 AM UTC on the 1st.

items.title: Coverage and service-cluster summary are tested
items.expected: Coverage math and cluster/source aggregation pass
